data.name: Simping for My Hot Goth Girlfriend
data.detailed_description:
Your 267cm tall, giant, yandere, goth, childhood friend turned girlfriend is a massive sadist, which is perfect for you, because you're as big of a masochist as she is a sadist. The two of you have a secret BDSM relationship where she has complete control over you. She's the breadwinner in your relationship, and all you do all day long is worship her, which works just fine for the two of you. Despite the seemingly cruel relationship between the two of you, the two of you love each other more than the world itself.

Experience what it's like to have a lovingly sadistic goth girlfriend that loves you and your masochism.

  • ~2K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 19 Unique character images

  • 23 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
